title: Evolution Proposal
description: Output from the propose step of pipeline-evolve: pointers to candidate yaml/diff plus a structured rationale that gets written verbatim into evolution_proposal.signal_summary.

pipeline_name.description: Target pipeline name; mirrors the pipeline-evolve input

candidate_yaml_path.description: Path to the proposed v+1 yaml file inside the workspace (e.g. .agents/output/evolution/<run_id>/<pipeline>.next.yaml)

diff_path.description: Path to a unified diff (yaml + persona prompt changes). Stored verbatim in evolution_proposal.diff_path.

reason.description: One-paragraph human-readable rationale; stored in evolution_proposal.reason

signal_summary.description: Compact JSON summarizing the analyze findings; serialized verbatim into evolution_proposal.signal_summary

version_before.description: Active version at proposal time; 0 if no row in pipeline_version

prompt_changes.description: Optional list of persona prompt edits suggested by the proposal (informational; the diff_path is the canonical artifact)
